Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.bean.hal
Juneau @Marshalled types for the HAL (Hypertext Application Language) hypermedia format, also covered by draft-kelly-json-hal-08.
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi
Juneau @Marshalled types for the JSON:API v1.1 wire format.
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema
JSON Schema Data Transfer Objects
org.apache.juneau.config
Configuration Support
org.apache.juneau.examples.serializer
Serializer Examples
org.apache.juneau.http.classic
Predefined HTTP headers, parts, entities, resources, and responses built on the classic Apache HttpComponents API.
org.apache.juneau.http.classic.entity
HTTP Entity Beans
org.apache.juneau.marshall
Marshalling API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections
Collections classes.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv
CSV Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson
Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
HTML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart
HTTP Part Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs
JCS (JSON Canonicalization Scheme) Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
RDF Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena.marshaller
Convenience marshallers pairing RDF serializers and parsers into single classes with fluent to/from methods.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5
JSON5 Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l
JSON5L (JSON5 Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl
JSONL (JSON Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema
JSON-Schema Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller
Marshallers
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi
OpenAPI Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet
Apache Parquet serialization and parsing support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext
Plaintext Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer
Serializer API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.soap
SOAP/XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse
Server-Sent Events (SSE) marshalling support — text/event-stream.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream
Public low-level token-streaming API (pull parser + push generator) shared by every Juneau format.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap
Swap API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.toml
TOML v1.0.0 serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon
UON Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
URL-Encoding Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml
YAML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.petstore.jetty
Apache Juneau Petstore - Jetty/Microservice deployment.
org.apache.juneau.petstore.springboot
Apache Juneau Petstore - Spring Boot deployment.
org.apache.juneau.rest.client
Next-generation REST client — transport-agnostic HTTP client built on Juneau's serialization stack.
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic
REST Client API
org.apache.juneau.rest.mock.classic
Mocked REST client and supporting classes for in-JVM testing built on the classic Apache HttpClient API.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.config
Predefined REST configuration interfaces
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.converter
REST Response Converters
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp
Stateless Model Context Protocol (MCP) endpoint built on juneau-rest-server using the juneau-bean-mcp wire types.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer used by org.apache.juneau.bean.hal
    Class
    Description
    SerializeException
    General exception thrown whenever an error occurs during serialization.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer used by org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi
    Class
    Description
    SerializeException
    General exception thrown whenever an error occurs during serialization.

    Class
    Description

    Class
    Description
    SerializeException
    General exception thrown whenever an error occurs during serialization.
    Serializer
    Parent class for all Juneau serializers.
    WriterSerializer
    Subclass of Serializer for character-based serializers.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer used by org.apache.juneau.examples.serializer
    Class
    Description
    OutputStreamSerializer
    Subclass of Serializer for byte-based serializers.
    SerializeException
    General exception thrown whenever an error occurs during serialization.
    Serializer
    Parent class for all Juneau serializers.
    SerializerPipe
    A wrapper around an object that a serializer sends its output to.
    SerializerSession
    Serializer session that lives for the duration of a single use of Serializer.

    Description

    Parent class for all Juneau serializers.

  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer used by org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer
    Class
    Description
    OutputStreamSerializer
    Subclass of Serializer for byte-based serializers.
    OutputStreamSerializer.Builder
    Builder class.
    OutputStreamSerializer.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed OutputStreamSerializer.create() / Serializer.copy() path.
    OutputStreamSerializerSession
    Subclass of SerializerSession for stream-based serializers.
    OutputStreamSerializerSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    SerializeException
    General exception thrown whenever an error occurs during serialization.
    Serializer
    Parent class for all Juneau serializers.
    Serializer.Builder
    Builder class.
    Serializer.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed Serializer.create() / Serializer.copy() path.
    SerializerConfig
    Annotation for specifying config properties defined in Serializer, OutputStreamSerializer, and WriterSerializer.
    SerializerListener
    Class for listening for serialize events during a serialization.
    SerializerMatch
    Represents a serializer and media type that matches an HTTP Accept header value.
    SerializerPipe
    A wrapper around an object that a serializer sends its output to.
    SerializerSession
    Serializer session that lives for the duration of a single use of Serializer.
    SerializerSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    SerializerSet
    Represents a group of Serializers that can be looked up by media type.
    SerializerSet.Builder
    Builder class.
    SerializerWriter
    Simple wrapper around a standard Writer with additional methods.
    WriterSerializer
    Subclass of Serializer for character-based serializers.
    WriterSerializer.Builder
    Builder class.
    WriterSerializer.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed WriterSerializer.create() / WriterSerializer.copy() path.
    WriterSerializerSession
    Subclass of SerializerSession for character-based serializers.
    WriterSerializerSession.Builder
    Builder class.

    A wrapper around an object that a serializer sends its output to.
    SerializerSession
    Serializer session that lives for the duration of a single use of Serializer.
    SerializerSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    WriterSerializer
    Subclass of Serializer for character-based serializers.
    WriterSerializer.Builder
    Builder class.
    WriterSerializerSession
    Subclass of SerializerSession for character-based serializers.
    WriterSerializerSession.Builder
    Builder class.
